entities.name: STRIGA HERMONTHICA
entities.description: A parasitic weed, also known as witchweed, that parasitizes cereal crops.

entities.name: SORGHUM
entities.description: A host crop for Striga hermonthica.

entities.name: PEARL MILLET
entities.description: A host crop for Striga hermonthica.

entities.name: MALI
entities.description: The country where the Striga hermonthica populations were collected.

entities.name: MICROSATELLITE MARKERS
entities.description: Genetic markers used to investigate the genetic diversity of the weed populations.

entities.name: GENETIC DIVERSITY
entities.description: The level of genetic variation observed within the populations of Striga hermonthica.

entities.name: ALLELIC DIVERSITY
entities.description: The variety of alleles distributed across the populations.

entities.name: GENETIC DIFFERENTIATION
entities.description: The degree of genetic difference between the populations.

entities.name: GENE FLOW
entities.description: The transfer of genetic material between populations.

entities.name: POPULATION STRUCTURE
entities.description: The organization of genetic variation within and among the populations.

entities.name: LOCAL ENVIRONMENT
entities.description: The physical surroundings of the populations.

entities.name: HOST GENOTYPE
entities.description: The genetic makeup of the host crop.

entities.name: SEED TRANSPORTATION
entities.description: The movement of seeds, potentially driven by human variables.
